drawer.closeTooltip: Close the help drawer and return to the main view

tabs.testsTooltip: Browse all 27 supported tests grouped by standard (RFC 2544, Y.1564, Y.1731, MEF, TSN)

tests.intro: The Stem supports 27 tests across 7 standards. Click any test for detailed documentation.
